com.routon.plsy.reader.sdk.demo.view

类 PlsyReaderSDKDemoActivity

  • java.lang.Object
    • Activity
      • com.routon.plsy.reader.sdk.demo.view.PlsyReaderSDKDemoActivity
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    IReaderView

    public class PlsyReaderSDKDemoActivity
extends Activity
implements IReaderView
    作者:
    lihuili

    读卡SDK示例程序 

     
 USB读卡器调用流程:
  
  //初始化USB设备对象
  private UsbDevPermissionMgr mUsbPermissionMgr;
  private UsbManager mUsbMgr;
  mUsbMgr = (UsbManager)mContext.getSystemService(Context.USB_SERVICE);
  mUsbPermissionMgr = new UsbDevPermissionMgr(mContext, mUsbCallBack);
 	
  //检查是否读卡器是否已连接
  boolean is_device_connected = mUsbPermissionMgr.init(getContext(), null);
  
  if(is_device_connected){
  	//已经连接读卡器, 打开读卡器
  	private IReader mReader;
  	mReader = new USBImpl();
  	UsbDevice usbDevice = mUsbPermissionMgr.getUsbDevice();
  	int ret = mReader.SDT_OpenPort(mUsbMgr, usbDevice);
 		if(ret >= ErrorCode.SUCCESS){
			//打开设备成功，找卡
			byte[] sn = new byte[8];
 			ret = mReader.SDT_FindIDCard(sn);                    
			if(ret == ErrorCode.SUCCESS){
      		//找卡成功，选卡
				ret = mReader.SDT_SelectIDCard(sn);
    			if(ret == ErrorCode.SUCCESS){
          		//选卡成功，读卡
       			IDCardInfo iDCardInfo = new IDCardInfo();
       			ret = mReader.RTN_ReadBaseMsg(iDCardInfo);
       			if (ErrorCode.SUCCESS == ret) {
              		//读卡成功，卡的基本信息、照片已经解析并存储到iDCardInfo中
       				Log.d("test", "读卡成功");
					}
   			}
			}
			
			//读卡结束，关闭读卡器
			mReader.SDT_ClosePort();
			
			//释放USB对象
			mUsbPermissionMgr.releaseMgr();
		}
 	}

      hexString转byteArr 例如： hexString2Bytes("00A8") returns { 0, (byte) 0xA8 }

      void onClick(View v) 
      void onGotStartReadcardResult(int error_code, boolean has_inner_reader) 
      void onItemSelected(<any> parent, View view, int position, long id)

      void onReadACardSuccessed(byte[] card_sn) 
      void onReaderStopped() 
      void onReadIDCardFailed() 
      void onReadIDCardSuccessed(ReportReadIDCardEvent event)

      • hexString2Bytes

        public static byte[] hexString2Bytes(java.lang.String hexString)
        hexString转byteArr

        例如：

        hexString2Bytes("00A8") returns { 0, (byte) 0xA8 }
        参数:
        hexString - 十六进制字符串
        返回:
        字节数组
